positive: A stylized, vibrant tropical jungle scene. The main subject is a cluster of exotic, oversized flora (monster leaves, luminous flowers, stylized vines) arranged in a symmetrical, circular pattern. The style should be highly detailed flat vector illustration with subtle gradient fills and strong linework, reminiscent of retro botanical prints but modernized. The color palette must feature teal, lime green, deep magenta, and ochre yellow. The composition needs high contrast silhouettes and clean edges suitable for screen printing on a dark garment. Lighting is soft but punchy, emphasizing the vibrancy of the leaves. Centralized, visually balanced, seamless tile pattern potential.
